notes: Positions from the LED-button production CSV + Edge_Cuts gerber (2026-06-22); board 20x20. JST J1/J2 IDENTICAL to the buzzer/knob -> buzzer housing template applies (connectors verified). This board uses the noknok M2.5 mounting standard, but only one hole (H1) is CSV-tagged (17.75, 2.25). Payload = Cherry MX-style keyboard switch (SW1, THT) with an SK6812MINI-E RGB backlight (D1). switch outer 15.9x15.7, plate-mount section 14x14, switch 11.6 mm tall above the PCB; THT pins protrude 2.7 mm on the bottom. CORRECTED (Christopher, 2026-07): the cover sits at PCB level (clearance_top=0.0, NO wall height above the PCB) and the WHOLE switch pokes out through the opening. So top_feature = 16.4x16.2 (the switch body 15.9x15.7 + ~0.5 clearance), NOT the 14x14 plate-notch (which is higher up the switch and would trap the wider body at PCB level). switch centred at (10,10), SK6812 LED sits 5 mm north at (10,15). clearance_bottom: more bottom-side parts than buzzer/knob (MT3540 boost U2, inductor L1) - 3.0 is socket-governed, verify on print.
